description:
Ken Pomeroy creates a wild but safe space of her own – one that is brutally honest, proudly Native American, and undeniably brilliant. Her outstretched hand to the wounded manifests as startlingly good songs. Pomeroy’s soprano is comforting, almost sweet, but perhaps most powerful delivering a devastating line. A deft guitarist, she opts for beds of rootsy strings that can soothe or haunt. Her song, “Wall of Death” made its way onto the Twisters soundtrack, while Hulu’s Reservation Dogs featured her soul-mining gem, “Cicadas”.

Concert: Sunday, August 10

Days of Sessions: August 9-10

Schedule is subject to change
subtitle: USA
title: Ken Pomeroy
